name: Galileo: Awakened Universe
overview: Sci-fi variety program that exploring the idea of life on Mars at the Mars Desert Research Station (MDRS) in Utah, where the desert conditions are similar to those on Mars. The cast experiences life as an inhabitant of Mars for a week.

trailers.title: GALILEO ′웰컴 투 마스!′ 화성을 향한 위대한 여정! 갈릴레오  깨어난 우주 180608 EP.1
